plugins.name: wzrdx-kb
plugins.notes: KB-first doctrine. Installed and registered by `wzrdx setup`.

plugins.name: company-profile
plugins.notes: Company base context. Ships with the `wzrdx company` command.

plugins.name: sales
plugins.notes: The anchor: weighted forecast, /pipeline-review, /call-prep, account research, outreach drafting; CRM connectors (HubSpot/Salesforce).

plugins.name: data
plugins.notes: RevOps analytics: pipeline exploration, forecast MAPE, coverage gaps. Shared with ops, rh and marketing.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.notes: Shared with marketing dept: GTM alignment — competitive briefs, battlecards, campaign performance.

plugins.name: small-business
plugins.notes: Shared subset: lead triage, call lists, sales briefs, CRM maintenance.

plugins.name: hubspot-mcp
plugins.notes: Connect when the CRM goes live; least-privilege API keys.

plugins.name: sales-skills-pack
plugins.notes: Prospecting, outbound, deals, proposals, enrichment, social listening, CRM. Vet repo before install (third-party packs execute code).

plugins.name: salesably
plugins.notes: 9 skills: deal qualification, prospect research, call prep, stakeholder engagement. Vet before install.

plugins.name: revops-suite
plugins.notes: Forecast bias/MAPE, LTV:CAC, Rule of 40 audits. Vet before install.
